certificate.caveat: Interim Validation. When operated in approved mode. The module generates SSPs (e.g., keys) whose strengths are modified by available entropy
certificate.description: The Bouncy Castle FIPS Java API is a comprehensive suite of FIPS Approved algorithms implemented in pure Java. All key sizes and modes have been implemented to allow flexibility and efficiency, and additional algorithms are available in non-approved operation as well.

services.name: Initialize Module and Run Self-Tests on Demand
Initialize Module and Run Self-Tests on Demand
services.description: The JRE will call the static constructor for self-tests on module initialization.

services.name: Show Status
services.description: A user can call FipsStatus.IsReady() at any time to determine if the module is ready. CryptoServicesRegistrar.IsI nApprovedOnlyMode() can be called to determine the FIPS mode of operation.

services.name: Info Service
services.description: A user can call DumpInfo.main() at any time to display the module version, checksum, and status information.

services.name: Zeroize / Power-off
services.description: The module uses the JVM garbage collector on thread termination.

services.name: Data Encryption
services.description: Used to encrypt data.
services.approvedFunctions: AES-ECB, AES- CBC, AES-OFB, AES-CFB8, AES- CFB128, AES-CTR, AES-CBC-CS, CCM, GCM, FF1

services.name: Data Decryption
services.description: Used to decrypt data.
services.approvedFunctions: AES-ECB, AES- CBC, AES-OFB, AES-CFB8, AES- CFB128, AES-CTR, AES-CBC-CS, CCM, GCM, FF1

services.name: MAC Calculation
services.description: Used to calculate data integrity codes with CMAC.

services.name: Signature Authentication
services.description: Used to generate signatures (DSA, ECDSA, EdDSA, RSA).
services.cspsAccessed: DSA Signing Key, EC Signing Key, EdDSA Signing Key, RSA Signing Key

services.name: Signature Verification
services.description: Used to verify digital signatures.
services.cspsAccessed: DSA Verification Key, EC Verification Key, EdDSA Verification Key, LMS Verification Key, RSA Verification Key

services.name: DRBG (SP800- 90A) output
services.description: Used for random number, IV and key generation.
services.cspsAccessed: Entropy Input String, DRBG Seed, Internal State V and C value, and DRBG Key
services.approvedFunctions: Counter DRBG, Hash DRBG, HMAC DRBG

services.name: Message Hashing
services.description: Used to generate message digest, SHAKE output
services.approvedFunctions: SHS, SHA-3, SHAKE, SHA-3 Derived Functions (cSHAKE, TupleHash, ParallelHash)

services.name: Keyed Message Hashing
services.description: Used to calculate data integrity codes with HMAC and KMAC.
services.cspsAccessed: HMAC Authentication Key, KMAC Authentication Key

services.name: TLS Key Derivation Function
services.description: Used to calculate a value suitable to be used for a master secret in TLS.
services.cspsAccessed: TLS Premaster secret TLS KDF Secret Value
services.approvedFunctions: HKDF, KDF, Existing Application- Specific (TLS KDF)

services.name: SP 800-108-rev1 KDF
services.description: Used to calculate a value suitable to be used for a secret key

services.name: SSH Derivation Function
services.description: Used to calculate a value suitable to be used for a secret key

services.name: X9.63 Derivation Function
services.description: Used to calculate a value suitable to be used for a secret key

services.name: SP 800-56C OneStep/TwoStep Key Derivation Function (KDM)
services.description: Used to calculate a value suitable to be used for a secret key
services.approvedFunctions: HKDF, KDF One Step, KDF Two Step.

services.name: IKEv2 Derivation Function
services.description: Used to calculate a value suitable to be used for a secret key

services.name: SRTP Derivation Function
services.description: Used to calculate a value suitable to be used for a secret key

services.name: PBKDF
services.description: Used to generate a key using an encoding of a password and message hash
services.cspsAccessed: HMAC Authentication Key, KMAC Authentication Key

services.name: Key Agreement Schemes
services.description: Used to calculate key agreement values (SP 800- 56A-rev3, Diffie-Hellman).
services.cspsAccessed: DH Agreement Private Key, DH Agreement Public Key, EC Agreement Private Key, EC Agreement Public Key, RSA Key Transport Private Key, RSA Key Transport Public Key.

services.name: Key Wrapping
services.description: Used to encrypt a key value. (RSA, AES)

services.name: Key Unwrapping
services.description: Used to decrypt a key value. (RSA, AES)

services.name: Key Verification
services.description: Used to verify key pair

services.name: Entropy Callback
services.description: Gathers entropy in a passive manner from a user- provided function

services.description: Returns a CSP as data that can be used for later output

services.description: Miscellaneous utility functions, does not access CSPs

Initialize Module and Run Self-Tests on Demand
The JRE will call the static constructor for self-tests on module initialization.
A user can call FipsStatus.IsReady() at any time to determine if the module is ready. CryptoServicesRegistrar.IsI nApprovedOnlyMode() can be called to determine the FIPS mode of operation.
A user can call DumpInfo.main() at any time to display the module version, checksum, and status information.
The module uses the JVM garbage collector on thread termination.

Used as seed for asymmetric key generation or for symmetric key generation
Minimum number of bits of entropy
A minimum of 16 bytes is required from the source configured for seed generation for the JVM. The entropy reader will block until the seed generator has provided the minimum number of bytes.
